name: zmodel_display_init
description: zModel_Display_Init initializes display, fog, scratch-buffer, graphics-option, and current variant-tag state for software and hardware renderer paths.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zModel_Display_Init: 263 unmasked mismatches after masking 260 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 532 bytes and the VC object body is 528 bytes with 11 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

The reviewed byte drift is broad initialization-order/register/control-flow drift in a large global setup function; the native smoke verifies software and hardware renderer initialization paths, fog defaults, graphics option selection, scratch state, and current variant-tag reset.
